subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou for having cast aside the pond, turning unto the Most Great Ocean, each wave of whose waves hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک بما نبذت الغدیر مقبلا الی البحر الاعظم الذی کل موج من امواجه ظهر علی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
